title: D002: Implement OpenBao deployment and secret management
summary: Review #4 after addressing external review #3 feedback from greptile-apps[bot]. Two targeted security fixes: (1) init-unseal.sh now pipes unseal keys via stdin and creates the init-keys Secret via kubectl apply -f - instead of --from-literal, preventing secret exposure in /proc/<pid>/cmdline process listings; (2) setup-auth.sh changes AppRole secret_id_ttl from 0 (never expires) to 8760h (1 year) to bound blast radius of leaked credentials. Both fixes are correctly implemented, consistently applied, and introduce no new bugs.

tests_checklist.item: V1-V3: No automated test framework applies to shell bootstrap scripts — manual review performed

code_quality_checklist.item: Q1: kube_exec_stdin follows single responsibility — stdin variant of kube_exec
Q2: Functions remain small and focused
Q3: No code duplication — kube_exec_stdin mirrors kube_exec pattern
Q4: Clear naming — kube_exec_stdin self-documenting with comment
Q6: No magic numbers — 8760h explained via inline comment as 1 year

security_checklist.item: S3: No hardcoded secrets — unseal keys and init output handled via stdin/pipe, never as CLI args
S5: Secrets not exposed in process listings — kube_exec_stdin + kubectl apply -f - pattern
Bounded credential lifetimes — secret_id_ttl=8760h replaces unbounded TTL=0
Consistent security mitigations across all bootstrap scripts

architecture_checklist.item: Changes are minimal and scoped to external reviewer feedback
init-unseal.sh local kube_exec_stdin correctly omits BAO_TOKEN (not available during init)
Pattern consistent with common.sh bao_exec_stdin and setup-policies.sh stdin usage

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No unnecessary abstractions — kube_exec_stdin is minimal stdin variant
No over-engineering — fixes address exactly the reported issues

fail_fast_checklist.item: set -euo pipefail preserved in both files

defensive_checklist.item: base64 -w 0 prevents line wrapping in Secret manifest
kubectl delete --ignore-not-found before apply ensures idempotent secret creation

suggested_improvements: docs/reference/infrastructure/openbao-bootstrap.md line 275 still shows 'Secret ID TTL: 0 (no expiry)' for the AppRole provisioner role — should be updated to '8760h (1 year)' to match the setup-auth.sh change. This file is outside the diff scope but the mismatch was introduced by this change.
next_steps: Update docs/reference/infrastructure/openbao-bootstrap.md AppRole table to reflect secret_id_ttl=8760h
